Scenario: Bind new device with EMI terms
Preconditions: Dealer logged in; unused key available; user app freshly installed
Steps: Create enrollment; enter customer data; enter total price/down payment/interest/duration/grace; confirm with user app code
Expected Result: Device becomes enrolled; key count decreases; EMI schedule created only after confirm
Failure Signal: Key count unchanged or schedule missing

Steps: Enter wrong code in user app
Expected Result: User app shows readable failure and backend does not activate device

Steps: Open user app dashboard; inspect local schedule/debug logs
Expected Result: Only 3 due rows exist; no month 4 reminder

Preconditions: Dealer and user app online; location permission granted
Steps: Tap Pull Location once; watch logs
Expected Result: FCM received; GPS read; report accepted; dealer map updates
Failure Signal: Accepted request but no map update

Scenario: Repeated pull does not clog DB
Steps: Tap Pull Location 5 times quickly
Expected Result: Only one active pull remains; UI cooldown shows

Steps: Tap Pull Location; wait timeout
Expected Result: Spinner stops; dealer sees pending/stale warning with timestamp
Failure Signal: Spinner forever or previous location shown as live

Steps: Submit lock request with reason/note
Expected Result: Dealer UI exits spinner and shows locked status
Failure Signal: Device locks but dialog spins forever

Steps: Submit unlock request
Expected Result: Dealer UI exits spinner and shows unlocked status
Failure Signal: Device unlocks but UI remains pending

Steps: Disconnect internet; enter offline unlock OTP/code
Expected Result: Device unlocks locally and syncs when online
Failure Signal: Device says no offline secret or status never syncs

Preconditions: READ_SMS permission granted; SMS format known
Steps: Send valid offline unlock SMS to device
Expected Result: User app detects SMS and starts unlock flow

Preconditions: Device enrolled and overlay permission initially granted
Steps: Open Android settings; disable display over other apps; return to user app or trigger dealer command
Expected Result: Backend receives degraded snapshot; dealer sees protection degraded quickly

Preconditions: Device enrolled and SMS permission initially granted
Steps: Disable SMS permission; return to user app or send OTP SMS
Expected Result: Backend receives SMS degraded snapshot; dealer sees SMS unlock degraded

Preconditions: Device enrolled; notification permission initially granted
Steps: Disable notification permission; return to user app or send dealer message
Expected Result: Backend receives notification degraded snapshot; dealer sees degraded notification status

Scenario: User app uninstalled or FCM token invalid
Preconditions: Device enrolled; backend has FCM token
Steps: Uninstall app if allowed or simulate invalid token; send command
Expected Result: Backend marks suspected app removal after FCM invalid response

Scenario: Device offline vs app removed distinction
Steps: Turn off internet; do not uninstall app; wait heartbeat window
Expected Result: Dealer shows offline/delayed

Steps: Send message from dealer app
Expected Result: UI returns quickly; user app displays message/notification

Steps: Start binding; try to skip NID/face photos
Expected Result: Wizard blocks until required evidence captured

Scenario: Demo account can skip vault requirement
Steps: Start demo enrollment
Expected Result: Demo flow does not block on Google Drive evidence

Preconditions: Render AMAPI env intentionally missing in staging
Steps: Tap generate enrollment QR
Expected Result: Dealer sees clear setup error

Scenario: Scan phone box/sticker IMEI QR or barcode
Preconditions: Dealer app installed with camera permission
Steps: Open Bind New Device; go to Device information; tap Scan; scan a QR/barcode containing IMEI1/IMEI2 plus serial/model text
Expected Result: Only valid Luhn IMEIs fill IMEI 1 and IMEI 2; serial/model numbers are ignored
Failure Signal: Serial number fills IMEI field or invalid IMEI accepted

Preconditions: Dealer app on Device information step
Steps: Type a random 15-digit number that fails Luhn; tap Next
Expected Result: Wizard blocks with readable invalid IMEI message

Scenario: Login screen does not expose backend URL
Steps: Open login; force login error
Expected Result: Error is human-readable and hides backend URL

Steps: Open device list and detail
Expected Result: Customer name and useful summary visible

Steps: Open location dialog; tap external maps action
Expected Result: Google Maps opens at coordinates
Failure Signal: Button missing or opens wrong place

Scenario: Registered device action unaffected by Redis outage
Steps: Send lock/location/message as registered dealer
Expected Result: Action accepted or fails open where safe

Scenario: Device token refresh repairs missing local token
Preconditions: Old enrolled app with no token
Steps: Trigger FCM/location or app startup refresh
Expected Result: Token saved and report works

Steps: Disconnect/reconnect network; send event
Expected Result: SSE reconnects and visible state refreshes
